summary.weather: Seoul (Sunday, March 29, 2026: Generally cloudy, 10°C to 21°C, light breezes, comfortable spring weather.)
summary.market: Weekend Summary: Q1 2026 volatility persists. Thursday, March 27, S&P 500 down 1.7%, Nasdaq down 2.4%. AI disruption fears and geopolitical tensions driving sentiment. Defensive sectors (Energy/Utilities) showing resilience.
summary.art: Market showing cautious recovery (4% growth globally). Shift towards local collectors noted; high-end segment ($10M+) driving public auction activity. Female artist representation continues to strengthen (37% of sales by value).
